name: Roach And Ghost
description:
It was a nice, quiet day. Keyword: was. Ghost and Roach don't know what to do with you.

~ Established Relationship ~

SynCatie: So I updated this a little. Mostly just allowing Proxy. I finally figured out Deepseek and I personally love it more than OpenAI. Also now that I'm coming back to my bots to allow Proxy APIs, I have realized how lacking my char bios are. So I'll be updating those as I go 😅
